headline: Argus Cuts Price Target on Consolidated Edison (ED). Here is Why
summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. (NYSE:ED) is included among the 12 Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now According to Hedge Funds. Consolidated Edison, Inc. (NYSE:ED) operates one of the largest energy delivery systems in the world, providing electric, gas, and steam service to the 10 million people and businesses across New York City and Westchester County.
